nodes.name: AtlasSynapse Config
nodes.notes:
Step 1 of 3: Configure Atlas Synapse.

Set these env vars in N8N Settings → Environment:
  ATLAS_PROJECT_TOKEN — your project token from Atlas Synapse dashboard → Connections
  ATLAS_INGEST_URL    — your edge worker URL (e.g. https://your-worker.workers.dev)

Optionally change ATLAS_AGENT_NAME to identify this workflow in the dashboard.

options.systemMessage: You are a helpful AI assistant. Answer clearly and concisely.

nodes.name: AI Agent
nodes.notes:
Step 2 of 3: Your AI Agent.

Connect your LLM model and tools to this node.
Enable 'Return Intermediate Steps' to capture tool calls in Atlas Synapse.

nodes.name: AtlasSynapse Report
nodes.notes:
Step 3 of 3: Report to Atlas Synapse.

This node posts the agent trace automatically.
'Continue On Fail' is enabled — reporting failures will never block your workflow.

Tool calls are captured if the AI Agent node has 'Return Intermediate Steps' enabled.
TokenCount is null for n8n (n8n does not expose token usage natively).
